_comment: Product Builder review-checks marker file. Used by B30 (hardcoded brand literal detector) to know which hex values were dropped during the 2026-06-27 Keel rebrand and should no longer appear in JS/HTML inline styles. NOTE: #1e40af is kept off the list because it is still the semantic 'info' foreground (on #dbeafe bg) for in_progress badges — semantic info-blue is unaffected by the brand recolour. See PRODUCT_BUILDER/references/review_checks.py.
_b32_comment: B32 detector — SPA uses X-FIO-User header (set by the fetch wrapper). Any browser navigation (window.location/window.open/location.assign) to /api/ must wrap the URL in _withIdentity so the GET-only ?as= shortcut survives. See PRODUCT_BUILDER 2026-06-29 retro V129.
_b33_comment: B33 detector — HTML/JS <option value='X'> lists that reference SOME but not ALL codes from a canonical set are drifted hardcoded dropdowns. Source of truth is services/pc_codes.CANONICAL. See PRODUCT_BUILDER 2026-06-30 retro AA150.
_b34_comment: B34 detector — inline Content-Disposition literals with an interpolated filename will 502 the moment the filename contains a non-ASCII byte (h11 rejects it). Route through the RFC 5987 helper _content_disposition() instead. See PRODUCT_BUILDER 2026-07-01 retro AA153.
_b35_comment: B35 detector — any sqlite3.connect() factory must set PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL + busy_timeout, else concurrent gunicorn workers hit 'database is locked' → random 500s. services/db.get_connection() sets both. See PRODUCT_BUILDER 2026-07-09 retro.
